business_demo.description: Create a business proposal presentation for a new AI-powered customer service platform
business_demo.input: Create a business proposal presentation for an AI-powered customer service platform that helps companies reduce support costs by 60% while improving customer satisfaction. Include market analysis, product features, business model, competitive advantages, and investment opportunities. Target audience is potential investors and enterprise customers.
business_demo.title: AI Customer Service Platform - Investment Proposal

tech_sharing.description: Create a technical presentation about microservices migration
tech_sharing.input: Create a technical sharing presentation about migrating from monolithic architecture to microservices. Include the challenges of monolithic systems, microservices design patterns, implementation strategies, database considerations, monitoring and observability, and lessons learned. Include code examples and architecture diagrams.
tech_sharing.title: Microservices Migration - A Technical Journey

education_training.description: Create an educational presentation about React Hooks
education_training.input: Create an educational presentation about React Hooks for frontend developers. Cover useState, useEffect, useContext, useReducer, and custom hooks. Include practical examples, common pitfalls, performance optimization techniques, and hands-on exercises. Make it interactive and engaging for learners.
education_training.title: Mastering React Hooks - Complete Guide

product_launch.description: Create a product launch presentation for a new mobile app
product_launch.input: Create a product launch presentation for a new fitness tracking mobile app. Include market opportunity, app features and benefits, user interface design, technology stack, monetization strategy, marketing plan, and timeline. Show screenshots and user journey flows. Make it exciting and visually appealing.
product_launch.title: FitLife - Your Smart Fitness Companion
